headline: Military offensive escalates in eastern Ukraine
justification: Active military offensive with confirmed ground attacks near supplier facilities in eastern Ukraine. Three suppliers have facilities within 50km of active conflict zones with $425k in open POs at immediate risk.
recommendations: ["IMMEDIATE: Activate emergency procurement protocol - contact all affected suppliers within 24 hours to confirm operational status.","Initiate alternative sourcing from pre-approved backup suppliers in Poland and Romania for all critical materials.","Expedite open POs with delivery dates within the next 30 days - request early shipment or air freight.","Freeze new PO commitments to suppliers in UA/RU until situation stabilises - escalate to CPO.","Place safety stock orders for critical materials with 60-day lead times to buffer potential supply interruption."]

headline: Sanctions expanded on key industrial sector in Russia
justification: New trade sanctions directly impact steel and chemical suppliers in the region. Two suppliers face potential export restrictions affecting $287k in open contracts.
recommendations: ["Contact affected suppliers within 48 hours to assess sanction compliance and delivery commitments.","Engage legal team to review contract force-majeure clauses for all RU-based supplier agreements.","Identify alternative EU/APAC suppliers for steel and chemical categories as contingency.","Increase safety stock targets by 25% for sanction-affected materials over the next 60 days.","Monitor GDELT signals daily - escalate to Critical if further sanctions are announced."]

headline: Civil unrest reported near port facilities in Nigeria
justification: Port disruptions affecting logistics for 2 suppliers with active shipments. Unrest near Lagos port may delay inbound freight by 1-2 weeks.
recommendations: ["Contact logistics provider to assess current freight status through Lagos port.","Evaluate rerouting active shipments through alternative ports (Port Harcourt or Apapa).","Request suppliers confirm stock availability for expedited partial shipments if possible.","Prepare contingency sourcing plan from West Africa alternatives ready within 72 hours.","Review transit insurance coverage for goods currently in-transit through the affected zone."]

headline: Protest movement disrupts supply routes in Israel
justification: Road closures reported near Tel Aviv; supplier deliveries may be delayed by 3-5 days. Situation appears localised with no impact on production facilities.
recommendations: ["Monitor situation closely - schedule supplier check-in call within 48 hours.","Review open PO delivery schedules and flag any at-risk deliveries to the procurement team.","Consider minor safety stock increase (10-15%) for affected materials as a precaution.","Update risk register with current event details and assigned risk owner."]

headline: Political tensions rise in Belarus
justification: Early-stage political tensions with no direct supply chain impact identified yet. Situation is being monitored but no supplier facilities are in affected zones.
recommendations: ["Log event in risk register for audit trail.","No immediate procurement action required - continue routine supplier monitoring."]
